description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsBrown tri fold wallet that has a flap with a click clasp, three insert pockets, four card holders on the right, zipped pocket in the middle with two card holders on one side and an id card holder, two insert pockets with four card holders on the left, zipped back pocket and branding on the clasp in frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions: 10.5 cm x 13 cm
